mapper.insert: INSERT INTO documents (public_id, tenant_id, workspace_id, owner_user_id, title, task_prompt, task_prompt_hash, submit_count, status, latest_revision, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{publicId}, #{tenantId}, #{workspaceId}, #{ownerUserId}, #{title}, #{taskPrompt}, #{taskPromptHash}, 0, #{status}, #{latestRevision}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, public_id, tenant_id, workspace_id, owner_user_id, title, task_prompt, task_prompt_hash, initial_score, latest_score, submit_count, status, latest_revision, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at FROM documents WHERE owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId} AND task_prompt_hash = #{taskPromptHash} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND workspace_id = #{workspaceId} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE documents SET initial_score = COALESCE(initial_score, #{score}), latest_score = #{score}, submit_count = submit_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, public_id, tenant_id, workspace_id, owner_user_id, title, task_prompt, task_prompt_hash, initial_score, latest_score, submit_count, status, latest_revision, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at FROM documents WHERE owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND workspace_id = #{workspaceId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documents WHERE owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND workspace_id = #{workspaceId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, public_id, tenant_id, workspace_id, owner_user_id, title, task_prompt, task_prompt_hash, initial_score, latest_score, submit_count, status, latest_revision, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at FROM documents WHERE public_id = #{publicId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND workspace_id = #{workspaceId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, public_id, tenant_id, workspace_id, owner_user_id, title, task_prompt, task_prompt_hash, initial_score, latest_score, submit_count, status, latest_revision, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at FROM documents WHERE public_id = #{publicId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND workspace_id = #{workspaceId}
mapper.update: UPDATE documents SET latest_revision = #{newLatestRevision}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND latest_revision = #{expectedLatestRevision}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO document_revisions (document_id, revision, content, content_hash, created_by, created_at) VALUES (#{documentId}, #{revision}, #{content}, #{contentHash}, #{createdBy}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE documents SET title = #{title}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE documents SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE documents SET deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE documents SET deleted_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
